payload.label: window
payload.long_description: White-painted arched-top window with horizontal slatted blinds and a faint frosted/blurred patch at center; mid-rail indicates a double-hung sash, several slats are tilted and light from outside is visible — roughly 2.5 meters from the camera.
attributes: minor frame wear on left edge
